aws:requesttag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:resourcetag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:tagkeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

gameliftstreams:rolearn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the IAM role passed to Amazon GameLift Streams to assume for the stream session
